name: Blunder Man
bio:
I'm an advanced/intermediate chess player on a mission to stop blundering — and help you do the same. Watch my journey on YouTube and take your game to the next level with personalized coaching.

I offer two types of coaching:
1-on-1 Coaching – Personalized training built around your games, your mistakes, and the areas you want to improve most.

Group Coaching – Tailored to specific rating ranges with a heavy focus on tactics, calculation, and practical positional concepts.

cards.title: Coaching
cards.description: Pick a time that works and payment can be filled in bene
